pages.title: Zombified Piglin
pages.text: $(rev)Corpus entry:$(warn) fragments torn from Zombified Piglin donors keep their cultural locomotion hints even when stitched elsewhere.

pages.title: Recorded anatomy
pages.text: Head, Torso, Arms, Legs — nether-tainted humanoid pig hybrid.

pages.title: Stitcher's marginalia
pages.text: Pairs beautifully with blaze rods or skeleton limbs for themed brutes.
